title: Wahl GroomEase Trimmer and Beard Oil Set
features: BATTERY-OPERATED - The battery-operated stubble & beard trimmer is perfect for any man who likes to maintain a well-groomed beard
HIGH CARBON STEEL BLADES - Designed with high carbon steel blades, this is the ideal tool for trimming beards, sideburns, and necklines
ERGONOMIC - The ergonomic shape makes the trimmer easy to use, whilst cordless operation gives you full control wherever you are
MULTIFUNCTIONAL - Personalise your style with 3 close trim attachment combs and a 6-position guide comb providing cutting lengths from 1.5 mm to 12 mm
BEARD OIL - Complete with Wahl beard oil to condition and nurture your beard
description: Product Description The Wahl GroomEase Trimmer and Beard Oil Set is ideal for shaping & styling your beard. The cordless, battery operated Stubble & Beard Trimmer is perfect for any man who likes to maintain a well-groomed beard. The ergonomic design makes the trimmer easy to use, whilst cordless operation gives you full flexibility and control wherever you are. Designed with Wahl high carbon steel blades, this is the ideal tool for trimming and maintain well-looked after beards, sideburns, and necklines. Our precision ground blades ensure the best cutting performance, so you can achieve the look you want with ease. This Trimmer and Beard Oil Set comes with 3 close trim attachment combs and a 6-position guide comb providing cutting lengths from 1.5 mm to 12 mm, giving you ultimate precision and versatility to create desired beard look. For a closer cut, use without the combs to achieve an overall length of 0.5 mm. Complete your well-groomed look with Wahl Beard Oil to moisturise, condition and nurture your beard. Box Contains: Battery trimmer, blade guard, 3 close-trim attachment combs, V-Trim attachment comb, 5 position adjustable attachment comb, 10 ml Beard Oil, moustache comb, storage stand, blade oil, cleaning brush and instruction booklet. 2 x AA batteries are required. Safety Warning Always follow manufacturer instructions for safe use and handling. Keep away from children and pets. Use only as directed. Avoid contact with water or electrical components. Box Contains 1 x battery trimmer; 3 x close trim attachment combs; 1 x 6-position guide comb; 1 x 10ml Gentle Beard Oil; 1 x moustache comb; 1 x blade oil; 1 x cleaning brush; 1 x instruction booklet. See more
